title: Jarellian
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Jarellian''' was the language of the [[Jarell]], and the dominant language on [[Pembric II]]. There were several dialects, one of which was predominant.

==Appearances==
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
